hero.title: Frontend Developer
hero.tagline: I build fast, accessible, and beautiful web experiences.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio_1: I'm a frontend developer who cares deeply about the craft — clean architecture, thoughtful interactions, and interfaces that feel as good as they look.
about.bio_2: I work primarily with Angular, TypeScript, and modern CSS. I enjoy the challenge of translating complex requirements into simple, elegant solutions.
about.bio_3: When I'm not building products, I'm exploring design systems, contributing to open source, and obsessing over typographic details.
